accessNotes.en: I Zaltsa einai apomonomeni voiotiki akti me chomatini kai arketa dysvati prosvasi. Thelei prosochi, eidika meta apo kakokairia. Protimise ochima me kali apostasi apo to edafos kai apofyge tin prosvasi meta apo kakokairia.
accessNotes.gr: Η Ζάλτσα είναι απομονωμένη βοιωτική ακτή με χωμάτινη και αρκετά δύσβατη πρόσβαση. Θέλει προσοχή, ειδικά μετά από κακοκαιρία. Προτίμησε όχημα με καλή απόσταση από το έδαφος και απόφυγε την πρόσβαση μετά από κακοκαιρία.
accessNotes.fr: I Zaltsa einai apomonomeni voiotiki akti me chomatini kai arketa dysvati prosvasi. Thelei prosochi, eidika meta apo kakokairia. Protimise ochima me kali apostasi apo to edafos kai apofyge tin prosvasi meta apo kakokairia.
accessNotes.de: I Zaltsa einai apomonomeni voiotiki akti me chomatini kai arketa dysvati prosvasi. Thelei prosochi, eidika meta apo kakokairia. Protimise ochima me kali apostasi apo to edafos kai apofyge tin prosvasi meta apo kakokairia.
accessNotes.it: I Zaltsa einai apomonomeni voiotiki akti me chomatini kai arketa dysvati prosvasi. Thelei prosochi, eidika meta apo kakokairia. Protimise ochima me kali apostasi apo to edafos kai apofyge tin prosvasi meta apo kakokairia.

verification_sources: Mainland audit 2026-05-25: source describes Zaltsa/Zelitsa access as only by dirt road and the area as very difficult; kept as difficult dirt road, not strict 4x4-only.

sourceNotes: Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02: Visit Thiva supports Livadostra as a named bay/beach in the Theban area, and BeachSearcher supports sand/pebbles, road-adjacent access, cafes/sunbeds/umbrellas, one nearby restaurant, and normal depth increase. Confidence promoted to high; windProfile, scoring, and photos were not changed.
